verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faro' kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa, Hebru-te' Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theihna dingin ka mite paisak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in amaute paisak ding nialin amaute na let lai leh
lo sunga om ganhing, sakolte, late, kalaohte, bawnghonte, leh tuuhonte tungah a nasia mahmah gimna ka tungsak ding hi
Israel mite-a' khempeuh khat beek a sihlohna dingin Israel-te' ganhingte leh Egypt-te' ganhingte' kikalah Topa in a kilamdan'na khat ka bawl ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Topa in a hun khat seh a, “Zing ciangin Topa in hih gam sungah hih na hong sem ding hi,” a ci hi
A zing ciangin Topa in hih na sem hi. Egypt mite' ganhing khempeuh si a, ahih hangin Israel mite' ganhing khat zong silo hi
Faro in a en dingin mi sawl a, Israel-te' ganhing khat zong na silo hi. Ahih hangin Faro' lungsim khauh lai a, amah in mite paisaklo hi.
Topa in Moses leh Aaron' kiangah, “Meiphualpi panin khut dimin vut la un la, Faro' muhin vantung lamah Moses in lawn hen
Tua vutte, Egypt gam khempeuhah leivui nel bangin kithehthang ding a, Egypt gamsung khempeuhah mihing leh ganhing tungah meimatum suakin kilawhgawp ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in meiphualpi panin vutte la-in Faro' mai-ah ding uh a, Moses in vantung lamah tuate lawn a, tuate in mihing leh ganhing tungah meimatum piangsakin kilawhgawp hi
Mitphial siamte in meimatum veina hangin Moses demzo nawnlo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mitphial siamte leh Egypt mite khempeuh in meimatum vei uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa in Faro' lungsim khauhsak a, Topa in Moses' tunga a gensa bangin amah in amaute' thu ngailo hi.

Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Zingsangin tho baih in la, Faro' mai-ah dingin ama kiangah, ‘Hebru mite' Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theihna dingun ka mite paisak in

Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuhah kei tawh a kibang khat beek omlo hi, ci-in na theihna dingin hih hunin na inn sungtawng dong leh na nasemte leh na mite' tungah ka gimnate khempeuh kong tungsak ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in keimah in ka khut zanin natna tawh nang leh na mite hong vatgawpin, leitung panin note hong kibeisak thei hi
Ahi zongin leitung khempeuhah keima min a kipulak theihna dingin note tungah ka vangliatna lah ding deihna-in kong nungtasak lai hi
Ka mite tungah nang kiliansak lai-in amaute na paisak kei hi
En in, zing ciang tubang hunin Egypt gam a kisat-a kipanin tuhun dongin tua bang a kimu ngeilo, a tam mahmah gialpi ka kiasak ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mi sawl in la, na ganhingte leh gamlaka na neihte khempeuh a muan'huai bukna-ah koih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh inn-ah a kipaipihlo, gamlaka om mihing leh ganhing tungah gialpi kia ding a, amaute si ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Faro' nasemte' lak panin Topa' thu a zahtak mi in ama silate leh a ganhingte inn-ah taisak hi
Ahi zongin Topa' thu a donlo mi in ama silate leh a ganhingte gamlakah nusia hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt gamsung khempeuh-a mihing leh ganhing leh gamlak kungte khempeuh tungah gialpi a kiat theihna dingin vantung lamah na khut zan in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses in vantung lamah a ciangkhut a zan hi. Topa in van gingsakin gialpi kiasak a, leitungah keek kia suk hi. Topa in Egypt gam sungah gialpi zusak hi
Egypt gam minam khat a suah khit-a kipanin tua bang a om ngeilo, a tam mahmah gialpi leh gialpi lakah khua phia-in keek ging om tawntung hi
Gialpi in Egypt gam sunga a om mihing leh ganhing, na khempeuh deenggawp hi. Gialpi in gamlak kung khempeuh deenggawp a, gamlak singkung khempeuh deengtan hi
Israel mite a omna Goshen gam bekah gialpi kialo hi
Tua ciangin Faro in mi sawlin Moses leh Aaron samsakin amaute kiangah, “Tutungin ka khial hi. Topa man hi. Kei leh ka mite ka khial uh hi
Topa' tungah thum un. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih vanging leh gialpi kicingzo hi. Note kong paisak ding a, note na khawl nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Moses in ama kiangah, “Khuapi panin ka paikhiat khit phetin Topa' lamah ka khut ka zan ding hi. Leitung pen Topa-a' hi, ci-in na theihna dingin vanging tawpin gialpi om nawnlo ding hi
Ahih hangin nang leh na nasemte in ahih leh, Topa Pasian na zahtak nailohna uh ka thei hi,” a ci hi
(Anthul kungte leh mangbuhham kisia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mangbuhhamte a vuih laitak hi a, anthul kungte a pak laitak ahi hi
Ahih hangin mangbuh leh mangbuhmante sialo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate khangham nailo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro' kiang pan khuapi pualamah Moses paikhia a, Topa' lamah a khut zanin thu a ngen hi. Vanging leh gialpi tawp pah a, leitungah guah bua nawnlo hi
Ahih hangin guah leh gialpi leh vanging a khawlna Faro in a muh ciangin amah khial lai a, amah leh a nasemte in a lungsim uh khauhsak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Moses tung tawnin a gensa bangin Faro' lungsim khauh lai a, amah in Israel mite paisaklo hi.
